items.name: Adventurer Backpack
items.description: A handy pack for the sophisticated, danger seeker.

items.name: Golden Rolling Hoverboard
items.description: Nothing says sophistication like solid gold. Control your direction using arrow keys or the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys. Hit Backspace to dismount.

items.name: Rock Thunder
items.description: Your guitar has the lightning, now it's time to bring the thunder! You're gonna rock this stage. Change the chord using the keys, 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N', 'M'. Alter the pitch using the keys 'G', 'H', 'J', 'K', 'L'. Hold shift to sharpen the chords. Complete the synchronized pattern of notes special (hit the ctrl key to begin) with at least 75% accuracy to shoot out non-lethal blue lightning.

items.description: The silliest Ro Ped yet!  Hit the 'H' key to make it quack!  Hit 'Q' to make it rain ducks.

items.name: Alpaca Mount
items.description: Alpaca your bags, you're ready to ride! Equip to spawn in front of you and simply hop on. Walks at a normal pace; however can jump super high.

items.name: Fang Of Anansi
items.description: "The surest poison is time"... but the second surest poison is contained in the spiders unleashed by this powerful sword. Slash and stab with the blade, or summon spiders to defeat your foe for you.

items.name: Oh Noez!
items.description: Oh noez! Looks like someone got hurt!

items.description:

Von 99 Luftballons /
Und dass sowas von sowas kommt
